title: Intro
description: Please HELP! Many of your kinfolk throughout your kindom are in need of your assistance. Follow these questful instructions, overcome the bewitching challenges, choose wisely, and you shall be eternally rewarded.

title: But quickly!!!!
description: Time is of the essence! You must complete these challenges within 90mins. If you get stuck, you can refresh this page and/or ask your leaders for help.

title: Requirements
description: For your quest you need cookies. Find the cookies. You have 20 seconds to find them.
confirmationText: We have a plate of cookies.

title: Choose
description: You have two options. Which do you choose?

title: Enjoy
description: Enjoy your cookies.

title: Answer
description: Which princess could have also survived Daniels lions den?

title: Service
description: Take 10 mins to either: walk their dog or spread some mulch

title: Cookie
description: Give the owners a few cookies if still you have some

title: Answer
description: Which princess would understand Samson best?

title: Who said this to royalty?
description: there has not been such great faith among all the people

title: Service
description:
Knock on the door. Take 10 mins and either: 
Sort legos, 
Do a puppet show, 
or Homeowners choice

title: Cookie
description: Give them a few cookies if you have some

title: Well done!
description: Now go here

title: Answer
description: When ye are in the service of your fellow beings ye are only in the service of your

title: Answer
description: Choose the smallest person in the group

title: You must carry them to the next waypoint
description: Carry her here

title: Good job. Put her down now
description: Now go here
adminExplaination: This is the Northrup home location

title: Dig
description: Your next clue is buried
adminExplaination: They should dig and find a bag with paper and a QR code

title: Baptism notes
description: Take 3mins to write a note to someone who just got baptized. What would the savior say to someone that just got baptized?

title: Answer
description: Which princess would have done best following the star to Bethlehem?

title: Now go here
adminExplaination: This is the Northrup home location

title: Dropoff
description: Drop off your notes in their mailbox. Also drop off some cookies if you have some.

title: Answer using The For Strength Of Youth - Look in the section called Walk in God’s light
description: How can I know if I'm feeling the Holy Ghost? Learning to be aware of the Spirit takes
adminExplaination: p19 of the strength of youth

title: Clue
description: "To dream I'd find romance"
adminExplaination: This is a quote from Frozen. When Anna is singing, a painting is shown. What is the name of the painting?

title: Choose
description: You have two options. Which do you choose?

title: Answer
description: Who will it be?

title: Slide
description: The chosen person slides down the slide 6.5 times. Hurry, you only have 2mins to complete this!
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Slide
description: Everyone slide down the slide at the same time together. Hurry, you only have 2mins to complete this!
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Well done!
description: Now go here
adminExplaination: This is the Aaron home location

title: Service
description: You have made it to Rapunzel's tower. Knock on the door, split up, and spend 8 minuets cleaning her tower.

title: Cookie
description: Give Rapunzel a cookie if you have one

title: Answer
description: Chose someone (it cannot be someone that has been picked before)

title: Act
description: Everyone has to guess what the chosen person is acting out. (chosen person take this phone and only you are allowed to look at the next page)

title: Act
description: Act out 'The temple' without using words or noises. When someone guesses it, move on.

title: Lay down on the ground
description: Spell 'Walk With Me' with your bodies

title: Watch & Answer
description: How many Os are in the snake? (hint: watch more than the first 10s)

title: Choose
description: You have two options. Which do you choose?

options.text: One person does something (it cannot be the same individual as the previous challenge if you chose that)

title: Answer
description: Who will it be? (it cannot be the same individual as the previous challenge if you chose that)

title: Jump
description: One person must jump over everyoone else.
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Pyramid
description: Form a human pyramid.
adminExplaination: Perform the activity and take a picture of them doing it. They must take a picture of them doing it to move on.

title: Answer
description: Which princess loves the story of Jonah?

title: Quest Complete!
description: Wow you did it. Congradulations! Now head inside. If you have not eaten a cookie, you get 2.
